name: Clarity
tagline: Clean business layouts that keep the content in front.

contentDefaults.text: A structured package for decisions, plans, and operating updates.

paragraphs.text: A structured package for decisions, plans, and operating updates.

contentDefaults.text:
Demand is strong; focus is the constraint.
Two levers recover most of the upside.
Ship the core path now, defer exploration.
Decision needed: scope and owner model.

contentDefaults.text:
Cost has dropped enough to be ambient.
Teams expect tooling that adapts to them.
The winning interface disappears.

contentDefaults.text: A dense narrative slide for the explanation that needs room.

paragraphs.text: A dense narrative slide for the explanation that needs room.

contentDefaults.text: Use this layout when the deck needs a real explanatory paragraph: background, requirements, analysis, caveats, or a compact narrative that should not be forced into bullets. The text area is intentionally broad and calm so dense content remains readable.

paragraphs.text: Use this layout when the deck needs a real explanatory paragraph: background, requirements, analysis, caveats, or a compact narrative that should not be forced into bullets. The text area is intentionally broad and calm so dense content remains readable.
